title: CorpFlowAI homepage trust band
description: Quiet horizontal trust band illustration with five small geometric markers representing CorpFlowAI's operating principles: real, evidence-led, lightweight, monitored, humble. Hand-crafted SVG — no people, no logos, no testimonial photos.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock or use in third-party marketing without written agreement.

accessibility.alt: A quiet horizontal trust band with five small geometric markers symbolising the CorpFlowAI operating principles: real, evidence-led, lightweight, monitored, humble.

usage.notes: slot:homepage_trust_band. Renders below the Trust section's principle list as a subtle visual reinforcement. Pure SVG, ~1.4 KB on the wire.
